framework.name: Decentralized Bundler Network Model
framework.description: ERC-4337 explicitly designs for permissionless bundler participation through public mempools and MEV-boost integration, positioning against proprietary gatekeepers. Any block builder can bundle UserOperations without special permissions.
framework.raw_quote: Decentralization: Allow any bundler (think: block builder) to participate in the process of including account-abstracted UserOperations. Work with all activity happening over a public mempool; users do not need to know the direct communication addresses (eg. IP, onion) of any specific actors

source.title: ERC-4337: Account Abstraction Using Alt Mempool
